about.title: About SayBetter
about.description: SayBetter helps you express yourself more clearly and respectfully. It does not help with manipulation, harassment, threats, deception, or emotional abuse.
about.whatIsBody: SayBetter is an open-source communication assistant. It is not a chatbot, and it is not a tool for emotional manipulation. It helps you rewrite what you want to say into something clearer, more tactful, and more effective — in situations like declining, following up, apologizing, expressing dissatisfaction, setting boundaries, and communicating at work or at home.
about.feature1: Rewrite difficult messages into 3-5 better versions
about.feature2: Choose relationship, goal, and tone for tailored output
about.feature3: 12 scenario-based prompt library, open for community contributions
about.feature5: Shareable cards (PNG download) for social media
about.feature6: Works with OpenAI, DeepSeek, Kimi, Ollama, and any compatible API
about.notAllowedTitle: What SayBetter does not help with
about.privacy1: Your inputs are never stored on our servers.
about.privacy2: If self-hosted, all model requests use your own configuration.
about.privacy3: The public demo is for experience only — avoid entering sensitive information.
about.openSourceBody: SayBetter is fully open source under MIT license. The scenario library is the heart of the project — anyone can contribute new scenarios via a simple YAML file. No login, no approval process, just a pull request.
about.slogan: Say what you mean, without the sting.
